hero.name: Alejandro Vásquez
hero.tagline: I design and build meaningful experiences.
hero.description: I'm passionate about technology and a constantly evolving digital creator, driven by my interest in continuous learning and a strong desire to leave a lasting impact through each of my projects.

about.title: About me
about.description: Software developer & IT Manager focused on modern frontend and building scalable, user‑centric web applications. Specialized in Next.js, React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS, integrating external APIs (Google Sheets, Google Forms, Gemini) and building backends with FastAPI, Node.js and .NET. I blend product thinking (UX/UI, component systems, Figma) with technical leadership and automation (Docker, n8n, GitHub Actions) to drive digital transformation and operational efficiency.

softSkills.title: Core soft skills & focus
softSkills.description: Technical leadership, clear communication, continuous improvement mindset, effective prioritization and analytical problem solving. Experience guiding teams, reducing operational time through automation, and enabling adoption of new tooling while keeping empathy for end users.

methods.title: Process & methodology
methods.description: Architecture first: domain boundaries, reusable component design (design systems + Storybook), incremental API integration and continuous measurement (metrics & AI feedback). I prioritize short iterations, pragmatic documentation and scalability from the initial design.

technical.title: Technical Skills
technical.description: Modern full‑stack stack focused on React / Next.js, scalable architecture, API integration, reusable component design, performance optimization and workflow automation.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Primary languages used to build scalable, maintainable applications.

frameworks.title: Frameworks & Libraries
frameworks.description: Frameworks & libraries for modern UI, robust APIs, visualization and component‑driven development.

databases.title: Databases
databases.description: SQL, realtime, caching and BaaS solutions for efficient persistence and low latency.

styling.title: Styling & UI
styling.description: Systems & tools to build consistent, accessible interfaces.

devops.title: Automation & DevOps
devops.description: Automation, CI/CD, orchestration and tooling accelerating reliable delivery.

career.title: Experience
career.description: Hybrid background in IT leadership and full‑stack development: AI automation, educational platforms and infrastructure modernization for educational organizations and freelance projects.

items.descriptionTitle: AI-powered platform to support teacher planning.
items.description: Educational platform developed with Liceo Taller San Miguel innovation team. Responsive frontend with Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind, reusable ShadCN UI components from Figma prototypes, Gemini API integration for educational content, and FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Redis backend.
keyFeatures: 30% reduction in teacher planning time through generative AI.
Modular system adaptable to different courses and subjects.
Complete integration with Gemini API for educational content generation.
Automated deployments with Docker and optimized persistence.
items.techStack: Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Gemini API

items.descriptionTitle: Teacher evaluation tool with automatic feedback.
items.description: System connecting to Google Forms API for automatic data collection, developing dynamic dashboards in React + Firebase and processing data to generate personalized AI feedback. Achieved 60% reduction in evaluation consolidation time.
keyFeatures: Automatic connection to Google Forms API for data collection.
Dynamic dashboards with real-time visualizations.
Data processing and AI-generated feedback.
60% reduction in evaluation consolidation time.
items.techStack: React, Firebase, Google Forms API, Chart.js, Node.js

items.description: Application for online survey collection and processing with Google Sheets API integration to centralize metrics and intuitive interface for indicator queries. Improved student disciplinary tracking efficiency by 70%.
keyFeatures: Automatic collection and processing of online surveys.
Google Sheets API integration for metrics centralization.
Intuitive interface for disciplinary indicator queries.
70% improvement in disciplinary tracking efficiency.
items.techStack: React, Google Sheets API, Node.js, Bootstrap

items.descriptionTitle: Web application for water reports and maintenance management.
items.description: Internal system developed in React with responsive dashboards and Firebase connection for cloud storage. Includes notification integration and maintenance modules, reducing manual workload by 50% with automated reports.
keyFeatures: React frontend with responsive and optimized dashboards.
Firebase connection for secure cloud storage.
Integrated notification system and maintenance modules.
50% reduction in manual workload through automated reports.

items.descriptionTitle: Corporate website implemented according to Figma design with SEO optimization.
items.description: Corporate website implementation in WordPress + Elementor following specific Figma design. Includes complete SEO optimization, performance improvements and premium user experience for the medical-aesthetic sector.
keyFeatures: Faithful implementation to Figma-designed prototype.
WordPress + Elementor for optimized content management.
Technical SEO optimization and performance improvements.
Premium user experience for medical sector.

items.descriptionTitle: WordPress redesign to improve UX and digitize queries/payments.
items.description: Complete redesign of public services website in WordPress to improve user experience and digitize query and payment processes. Increased user interaction by 25% with analytics integration and process optimization.
keyFeatures: Complete redesign focused on user experience improvement.
Digitization of online query and payment processes.
25% increase in registered user interaction.
Analytics integration and conversion optimization.

items.descriptionTitle: University Project - Dental clinic management system.
items.description: Comprehensive management system for dental clinic developed in .NET + Razor Pages. Includes scheduling module with dynamic validations to prevent appointment duplications, complete clinical history and administrative functions organized by roles.
keyFeatures: Scheduling module with dynamic anti-duplication validations.
Complete clinical history and patient tracking system.
Administrative functions organized by user roles.
.NET + Razor Pages architecture for university development.

items.description: Institutional portal for digitizing forms and internal administrative processes. Development of management modules in PHP + Bootstrap with 40% reduction in paper usage and optimization of institutional workflows.
keyFeatures: Complete digitization of administrative forms and processes.
Management modules developed in PHP + Bootstrap.
40% reduction in institutional paper usage.
Comprehensive optimization of administrative workflows.
